MQTT.em_wifi_connect|block: Wi-Fi connect | Pin setup: | RX pin: %receive | TX pin: %send | Wi‑Fi: | SSID: %SSID | Password: %PASSWORD start connection
MQTT.em_mqtt_connect|block: MQTT IoT service initial setup | Server: %serverIp | Port: %serverPort || Client ID: %clientId | Username: %username | Password: %clientPwd
MQTT.em_http_connect|block: MQTT IoT module connect to HTTP server Address: %serverIp | Port: %serverPort
MQTT.em_http_get|block: MQTT IoT module send GET request to topic %topic
